message:
fix: address round 3 review issues across 6 areas

- save_agent: validate name against kernel primitives, preserve thinking field
- genome: update in-memory state after git commit (not before) for consistency
- learn-process: reject empty strings in create_agent required fields
- scanAgentTree: skip agents/ dirs in namespace loop to prevent double-scan
- save-agent test: add afterEach cleanup, validateAgentName + thinking tests
- tree-scanner test: add duplicate-entry prevention test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
